# Iteration 1: Release APK Built for Manual Testing

- **Date:** 2026-07-11 00:12
- **Iteration:** 1 (readiness)

## What changed

A release APK was built to enable manual on-device verification for Iteration 0/1 checks. Building a release APK ensures the app compiles end-to-end and provides a stable binary for manual testing.

## APK details

- **Path:** build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk
- **Size:** ~44.2 MB
- **Build command:** `flutter build apk --release --no-shrink`
- **Build notes:** Kotlin compile error fixed by using action string literal for exact alarm request (`android.app.action.REQUEST_SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM`) to avoid compile-time constant dependency on newer SDK constants.

## Why

Providing the release APK is required by the updated testing guidelines: each iteration (especially those touching native code) must produce a runnable release APK for manual verification on a real device.

## Files touched

- `android/app/src/main/kotlin/com/wakeywakey/app/MainActivity.kt` (small fix to requestExactAlarmPermission)

## Verification

- [x] `flutter build apk --release` completed successfully
- [x] APK file present at `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk`

## Next steps

- Install the APK on a real device or emulator for manual checks:
  ```bash
  adb install -r build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk
  ```
- Run manual checks from `.github/history/2026-07-10-2341_iter0-manual-checklist.md` (permission prompts, exact alarm permission routing, MethodChannel round-trip)
